I found the `UsersController.scala` file in the webapp project. Here's the User data model:

## User Data Model

The `User` is defined as a **case class** with the following fields:

| Field Name | Type |
|------------|------|
| `id` | `Int` |
| `name` | `String` |
| `email` | `String` |
| `createdAt` | `java.time.LocalDateTime` |

The import at the top of the file shows it uses `java.time.LocalDateTime` for the timestamp type.

The file also includes sample data with three users:
- Alice (id: 1, created: 2024-01-15 10:30)
- Bob (id: 2, created: 2024-02-20 14:00)
- Charlie (id: 3, created: 2024-03-05 09:15)
